amazon_side_asn.description: The Autonomous System Number (ASN) for the Amazon side of a BGP session.

auto_accept_shared_attachments.description: Whether to automatically accept cross-account attachments for the transit gateway.

default_route_table_association.description: Whether resource attachments are automatically associated with the default association route table.

default_route_table_propagation.description: Whether resource attachments automatically propagate routes to the default propagation route table.

description.description: A description for the transit gateway.

dns_support.description: Enable or disable DNS support for the transit gateway.

multicast_support.description: Enable or disable multicast support on the transit gateway.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the transit gateway.

transit_gateway_cidr_blocks.description: The list of CIDR blocks for the transit gateway.

vpn_ecmp_support.description: Enable or disable Equal-Cost Multi-Path (ECMP) routing support for VPN connections.

timeouts.description: A map of timeouts for the transit gateway.
timeouts.type: object({ create: optional(string), delete: optional(string), update: optional(string) })
